final_orientation.name: Z-up flat
final_orientation.rationale: Keeps load in XY plane for best layer adhesion strength per Anisotropy framework.

support_strategy.removal_plan: Flush cutters + needle-nose pliers; expect 5 min support removal.

actions.action: Print Z-up flat with 50° support threshold and 15% support density
actions.verification: Overhang surface roughness < Ra 50 µm; supports detach cleanly

actions.action: Dry PETG and use bed temp 80 °C for adhesion
actions.verification: No corner lift in first 20 mm of print

actions.action: Run a 2-level Taguchi DOE (temperature × speed) to lock final parameters
actions.verification: Select parameter set with highest tensile strength SN ratio

test_print_plan.fallback: If corner lift > 0.2 mm, add 8 mm brim and reduce first-layer fan to 0%

evidence_links.claim: Z-up aligns XY strength with load
